meaning: adj.装满东西(或人)的,装填子弹的,(相机)装好胶卷的,(餐桌)摆满食品的
examples: I've just loaded my truck up.
She loaded the camera with film.
Next up is friendly Williams, a railroad town loaded with courtyard motels and mom-and-pop diners.
Laboratory tests of water samples in New Orleans found it loaded with fecal material.
